mapper.insert: insert into tbl_payment_subscribe (subscription_id, member_id, amount, payment_method, receipt_id, paid_at) values (#{subscriptionId}, #{memberId}, #{amount}, #{paymentMethod}, #{receiptId}, #{paidAt}::timestamp)
mapper.update: update tbl_payment_subscribe set payment_status = #{paymentStatus}, paid_at = #{paidAt}::timestamp where receipt_id = #{receiptId}
